Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry for messaging you even though there's no track practice. {f 1 3 153}[n]I actually wanted to ask you a favor. Could you come see me if you're free?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll probably be in the hallway on the second floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello! {f 1 3 140}[n]Since there's no practice today, do you wanna hang out again? I wanna know how you're doing, too. {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135} Aren't I the perfect team manager?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be at the second-floor hallway for a while. {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry about the other day. {f 1 3 142} I'd like to make it up to you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Wanna walk home together again?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be at the usual spot. Come see me if you can, okay? {f 1 3 132}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How's it going? {f 1 3 140}[n]Do you remember how I agreed to coach those kids for their race? I know they've been waiting for me, but do you have time to tag along?[n]{f 1 5 0}I don't know if I can do it alone... I'd love some of your advice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}'Sup, Coach {f 4 1}! Lol {f 1 3 137}[n]It's about time to supervise the kids again.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you can make it, I'll ask for permission to use the practice field, so just let me know, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kids finally raced against those sixth graders! {f 1 3 139}[n]They wanna tell me how they did, so... will you come with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good work today, Coach! {f 1 3 136}[n]Let's have ourselves a little party to commemorate the occasion! And soon! {f 1 3 154}[n]I've got a place in mind, so let me know when you have time! {f 1 3 156}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heyaaa {f 1 3 140} Whatcha doing?[n]{f 1 5 0}We don't have track practice today, so let's pop by the café before heading home. {f 1 3 150}{f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How are you doing? {f 1 3 137}[n]Do you have any free time today? I'll be waiting for you at the usual spot.[n]{f 1 5 0}It's nothing important, but I'd be really happy if you came. {f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heyyy {f 1 3 136}[n]Let's have ourselves a little party to celebrate our successful coaching careers! {f 1 3 154}[n]Preferably sooner than later, so come find me after school, okay? {f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey there~ {f 1 3 140}[n]Are you free after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}Since we don't have track practice today, let's pop by the café before heading home. {f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What're you doing after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me if you're free! {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You done for today? Wanna go home together? {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wanna head somewhere fun if you're free? {f 1 3 140}[n]I'll be in the hallway {f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wanna go somewhere? Lemme know if you're up for it {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No school AND no track practice? Guess that means we gotta go somewhere fun~[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's hang out! {f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't believe it...[n]Summer break's almost over.[n]Why's it gotta end? {f 1 3 140}[n](Haiku by Yuko Nishiwaki)[n]{f 1 5 0}The tournament zapped all my energy, so I think I'll recharge at the movies. {f 1 3 151}{f 1 3 143}[n]I got free tickets for an exciting one. Wanna come with? {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's gonna be a festival at Naganaki Shrine tonight. Let's check out all the stalls together![n]{f 1 5 0}I can't wait~ {f 1 3 132}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Merry Xmas~ {f 1 3 154}{f 1 3 154}{f 1 3 154}[n]Oops, did I send that too early? Lol {f 1 3 137}[n]I really wanna spend time with you today![n]{f 1 1}
